crossroads_room.name: The Crossroads
crossroads_room.description: This is it. The end of the line. The air is thick with the scent of ozone and copper. On the stainless steel table lie the tools you've gathered to cheat the design. One path leads to life, one to a gamble, and one into darkness.
crossroads_room.first_entry_text: You lock the warehouse doors. Outside, the world feels distant, like a dream you're finally waking up from. You have the tools. Now, you just have to use them.

furniture.name: stainless steel table
furniture.description: A cold metal surface holding your instruments of salvation.
furniture._comment: The Loot Populator will drop your collected tools here.

use.message_success: You slap the pads onto your chest and grip the leads. 'Clear!' you scream into the empty warehouse. Everything goes white.
You plunge the syringe into your arm. Your heart rate slows... slows... stops. You are dead. Now it's up to the adrenaline to bring you back.
The steel is cold against your palm. A life for a life. That's the only rule that ever mattered. You find your target and pull the trigger.

objects.name: cooling chamber
objects.description: A sealed industrial freezer unit, now repurposed. The temperature readout shows -5°C and dropping. This is the hypothermia station.
objects.examine_details: Plan D. If you have the Hypothermia Survival Kit, you can use it here. Your companion must be present and willing to pull you out.

use.message_success: You seal yourself inside. The cold closes in like a fist. Your heartbeat slows to a crawl... and then stops.

objects.name: breathing apparatus
objects.description: An industrial helium tank connected to a modified breathing mask. Next to it, a pure oxygen resuscitator on a timer.
objects.examine_details: Plan E. The Asphyxiation Survival Kit goes here. Four minutes. Your companion has to be ready with the resuscitator.

use.message_success: You breathe in. Once, twice. Then you stop feeling the need to breathe at all. Then you stop feeling anything.

objects.name: companion
objects.description: Someone who came this far with you. They're standing near the wall, watching you quietly.
objects.examine_details: They gave you a note. They're ready. Whether you accept what they're offering is another matter entirely.

use.message_success: You take their hands. You let go of the thread. It passes between you like heat.

objects.name: bludworth's formula
objects.description: A page of notes tacked to the warehouse wall. The math is laid out in full. The plan is insane. It might work.
objects.examine_details: Plan G: The Loop Exploit. No items required. Just timing, nerve, and a willingness to step in front of a car with exact precision.

use.message_no_flag: You've heard of this theory but you don't have the formula. You'd need Bludworth's notes to know the exact method.
use.message_success: You memorize the timing. You walk out of the warehouse. The street is right there. The car is coming on schedule. You have one shot at this.

examine_details.industrial battery array: The core of Plan A. If you have the Defibrillator Pads, you can use them here to stop and restart your heart with raw voltage.
examine_details.veterinary medical kit: Plan B. Using the Vet Sedatives here will induce clinical death. You'll need to hope your companions know when to hit the adrenaline.
examine_details.heavy revolver: Plan C. The 'New Life' rule is a lie. The only way to stop the list is to take someone else's place.
